name: yahoo-fantasy-baseball
description: Read and manage your Yahoo Fantasy Baseball team from Claude.
long_description: A bring-your-own-credentials extension that lets Claude read your Yahoo Fantasy Baseball roster, matchups, stats, and free agents — and, with your confirmation, add/drop players and set your lineup. You create your own free Yahoo app and complete a one-time authorization right inside Claude (just say "fantasy start"). Nothing is hosted; everything runs locally and your credentials stay on your machine.

tools.name: fantasy_status
tools.description: Check whether setup is complete and what to do next.

tools.name: fantasy_setup
tools.description: Start setup: Yahoo app guide and authorization link.

tools.name: fantasy_authorize
tools.description: Finish setup with the verification code from Yahoo.

tools.name: fantasy_select_team
tools.description: Set your default league and team.

tools.name: list_leagues
tools.description: List your leagues, game weeks, and stat categories.

tools.name: get_teams
tools.description: Stats, standings, and matchups for league teams.

tools.name: get_team_roster
tools.description: A team's roster with player stats for a date.

tools.name: get_team_stats_week
tools.description: A team's stats for a scoring week.

tools.name: get_player_stats
tools.description: Stats for players on a date.

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Recent league adds, drops, and trades.

tools.name: add_drop_player
tools.description: Add and/or drop a player (changes your roster).

tools.name: set_lineup
tools.description: Set your daily lineup (changes your roster).

client_id.title: Yahoo Client ID
client_id.description: From your Yahoo app (Consumer Key). Say "fantasy start" in chat if you don't have one yet.
